title: Astrochemistry & Interstellar Medium

rate_equations.why: Arrhenius: k = A·exp(-E_a/kT) = EML-1 → with log-temp = EML-2

grain_surface.formula: H₂ formation on grains: EML-2 (diffusion + thermal desorption)

cosmic_ray.formula: CR ionization: ζ·n_H: EML-2 (linear in density)

jeans.threshold: M > M_J: collapse begins = TYPE2 Horizon shadow=2

jets.new_finding: PROTOSTELLAR JETS = EML-3: helical magnetic field = complex oscillatory

analysis.filaments: Caustic formation: EML-∞ (Zel'dovich approximation → shell crossing = singularity)

verdicts.jets: EML-3: helical MHD field = complex oscillatory
verdicts.new_results: Protostellar jets=EML-3; spectral lines depth = quantum number type

key_theorem: Astrochemistry EML Theorem (S342): ISM chemistry = EML-2 throughout (Arrhenius, diffusion, photodissociation). Jeans collapse = TYPE2 Horizon shadow=2; free-fall singularity = EML-∞. NEW: Protostellar jets = EML-3 (helical MHD magnetic field = complex oscillatory). Spectral line depth follows quantum transition type: rotational/vibrational = EML-0 (algebraic quantum numbers); electronic/hyperfine (21cm) = EML-3 (complex wavefunction/spin coupling). The depth of spectral emission is determined by the quantum structure, not the wavelength.
rabbit_hole_log: Jeans instability: TYPE2 Horizon shadow=2; free-fall=EML-∞
